security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first project state, effort, and contribution from your git + forge
bundle.longDescription: gitstate — derive true project state, effort, contribution, and classification directly from your git + forge. Local-first: embedded SQLite, local classification, no telemetry, no multi-tenant server.
